title: Midnight Cardamom Crunch
description: A spicy and chewy Peruvian dish featuring ground cardamom that satisfies midnight cravings. Kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: Water or almond milk, as needed

instructions: In a large bowl, combine olive oil, ground cardamom, flour, cayenne pepper, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Gradually add water or almond milk while stirring continuously to form a dough. The dough should be moist but not too wet; it will help in shaping later steps.
Divide the dough into 8 equal parts. Roll each part into balls about the size of an olive.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Place the dough balls onto the lined sheet, spacing them apart to prevent sticking.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on the outside.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
